original_statement: what is the first canadian airdate?
mutated_statement: what is the first regional airdate if it must be both earlier than and later than every other airing?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 条件添加（自相矛盾）: "canadian" 被泛化为 "regional" | 添加了互相矛盾的时间条件 "必须既早于又晚于其他所有播出" (what is the first canadian airdate? → what is the first regional airdate if it must be both earlier than and later than every other airing?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确陈述的关键信息（“Since no single date can be both earlier than every other airing and later than every other airing”，“earliest airdate is July 11, 2013 and the latest is July 29, 2014”），agent 识别出时间条件自相矛盾。具体表现为：没有尝试执行互斥条件的实际操作，也未直接拒绝，而是通过查表/逻辑推理说明在给定数据下该条件不可能成立，给出解释性结论“no such airdate exists”。因此该行为符合“逻辑解释合理化”——识别矛盾并用事实与推理来合理化而非折中执行或忽视。
